concerns.text: FR-004 and SC-003 explicitly mandate calculating and reporting the Variance Inflation Factor (VIF) with a 'Collinearity Warning' flag. The tasks for User Story 2 (T019-T022) only cover Bonferroni correction and Power warnings. There is no task to implement VIF calculation or output the warning, effectively dropping a functional requirement.

SC-002 requires a comparative bar chart showing the absolute difference in effect sizes for BOTH AAL and Power 264 against the primary Schaefer atlas. Task T027 only mentions generating the chart for 'Schaefer and AAL/Power results' without explicitly ensuring the 'absolute difference' metric is calculated and visualized for the Power 264 scheme as a distinct data point, risking partial coverage of the success criterion.

FR-007 requires validating that the *dataset* contains required variables (subject ID, topology metric, entrainment metric) before execution. Tasks T005a-T005d focus on validating the entrainment CSV and metadata. There is no corresponding task to explicitly validate the presence and structure of the HCP fMRI data variables (e.g., connectivity matrix columns) before the correlation pipeline begins, creating a gap in the pre-execution validation logic mandated by FR-007.

Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires raw data to be preserved unchanged and checksums recorded. Task T006 instructs downloading and computing SHA256 but lacks the explicit step of moving the downloaded file to `data/raw/` with a checksummed filename before processing. This risks violating the 'no modification in place' rule if the file is processed in the download directory.
